/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/vterm-module.dir/link.d  -o /home/sdobrau/.emacs.d/packages/elpa/vterm-20260406.134/vterm-module.so "CMakeFiles/vterm-module.dir/vterm-module.c.o" "CMakeFiles/vterm-module.dir/utf8.c.o" "CMakeFiles/vterm-module.dir/elisp.c.o"  /usr/lib64/libvterm.so
